name: Nightmares Market
short_description: Nightmares Market is a 3D first-person view horror game where you play as a cashier in a dark and mysterious store. Be cautious, as nothing is as it seems in this eerie environment.
detailed_description:
Enter the Nightmares Market, an exciting 3D horror game that blends simulation and horror genres. Take on the role of a cashier in a dark and mysterious store where nothing is as it seems. Navigate through a store filled with shadows and secrets, constantly on guard for what lurks in the darkness.

Game Features:

Mystical Atmosphere: Experience an eerie and unsettling environment.
Graphics and Sound: Enjoy excellent visuals and sound design that immerse you in the horror atmosphere.
